ConstructorArguments: This will create a render target texture if oldTexture is null or doesn't match what you've passed in. This is designed to be called regularly to resize your texture in response to other things changing (like the screen size, panel size etc).

Documentation.Summary: This will create a render target texture if is null or doesn't match what you've passed in. This is designed to be called regularly to resize your texture in response to other things changing (like the screen size, panel size etc).
Documentation.Return: Will return a new texture, or the <paramref name="oldTexture" />.

Params.name: A meaningless debug name for your texture.

ConstructorArguments: Create a texture from an SVG source

Will release the handle for this texture. If the texture isn't referenced by anything else it'll be released properly. This will happen anyway because it's called in the destructor. By calling it manually you're just telling the engine you're done with this texture right now instead of waiting for the garbage collector.

Documentation.Summary:
Will release the handle for this texture. If the texture isn't referenced by anything
else it'll be released properly. This will happen anyway because it's called in the destructor.
By calling it manually you're just telling the engine you're done with this texture right now
instead of waiting for the garbage collector.
